title: Multi-Cloud CI/CD Platform
summary: Built a unified CI/CD platform spanning AWS, GCP and Azure for 40+ development teams.

content.value: Quotient operated across three cloud providers with each team maintaining its own CI/CD pipeline. This resulted in inconsistent deployment standards, duplicated pipeline scripts, and no centralised visibility into release quality.

Designed a multi-cloud CI/CD platform built on reusable GitHub Actions workflows and shared Terraform pipeline modules. A central pipeline registry allowed teams to reference standardised build, test, and deploy stages without writing their own from scratch.

Implemented Artifactory as the unified artifact repository across all clouds. Automated policy gates enforced SAST scanning, unit-test coverage thresholds, and container vulnerability scanning before any artifact could be promoted to staging or production.

40+ teams onboarded within 3 months. Release cycle reduced by 65% across teams due to parallel pipeline execution and elimination of manual deployment steps. Central dashboard provided real-time deployment status across all three clouds.
